creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Mon, May 14, 2007 at 05:46:31AM +0100, Hugo Silva wrote:
> Hi Edwin,
> 
> 
> I was updating the haproxy13 port to 1.3.10.2 yesterday, and today I 
> noticed I made a mistake:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112633
> 
> Synopsis:    Update port: net/haproxy -- to version 1.3.10.2
> 
> I meant net/haproxy13 :)
> 
> net/haproxy is the 1.2 branch, I've created haproxy13/ precisely because 
> it's the 1.3 branch (and I couldn't reach clement@ for a few months).

Aha, it wasn't clear you needed a repocopy on that one.

I changed the synopsis because of that, there is nothing you did
wrong. Well, besides not stating it was a new port and needed a
repocopy etc :-)

Edwin
